title: Bulb's Awesome Mod!
description: this mod just adds random stuff that i wanted to make at the time such as: a nuclear bomb, my head, etc
body:
![it's the main title of the mod stating Bulb's Awesome Mod!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f7a015dedc5797d82fa680e4a4374ae5193a478.png)

the mod has EVERYTHING (soon WIP) it has ORES, it has STRUCTURES (soon WIP) it EVEN HAS BOMBS!
and my head :)
not much to say so enjoy the stupidity made sofar! :)


yeah i completely forgot this existed and yeah i lost this project aswell
